ValidationRule.description: The Time Card can not be changed when validated.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR(
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, NOT($User.IsProjectManager__c), NOT($User.IsHRManager__c), OR( TimeValidatedProjectResponsible__c =true, TimeValidatedHumanResources__c =true ) ) ,
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, NOT($User.IsHRManager__c), $User.IsProjectManager__c, OR( ISCHANGED( DateFrom__c ), ISCHANGED( DateUntil__c ), ISCHANGED( DurationHhMmN__c ), ISCHANGED( DurationHhMm__c ) ), TimeValidatedHumanResources__c =true )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to make changes to validated time cards. (TC007)
